---
title: "Agricultural Engineering & Geospatial Data"
subtitle: "Harnessing Python for AgTech Solutions"
---

## Professional Profile

I am **Alexis Araujo**, an Agricultural Engineer specializing in geospatial analysis and data automation. This portfolio showcases my work in optimizing agricultural infrastructure and logistics.

### Featured Projects

* **[Grain Storage Network Optimization](30daymapchallenge/day1_points_silos/day1_points_silos.html)**
    A spatial study on grain storage distribution and capacity using point-pattern analysis.
    
* **[Agro-Logistics Dynamics: Multi-Commodity Flow](30daymapchallenge/day2_lines_antpath/day2_lines_antpath.html)**
    Visualizing regional supply chain connectivity through animated transit corridors and shortest-path algorithms.

* **[30 Day Map Challenge](https://github.com/alexisdaraujoc/alexisdaraujoc.github.io)**
    A continuous series of geospatial visualizations focusing on agricultural dynamics and infrastructure.

---
*Contact: [www.linkedin.com/in/alexisdaraujoc](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexisdaraujoc)*
